svg.title: EcoPulse full system architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture of the EcoPulse edge-AI home energy management system, from sensor perception through NILM, LSTM, PPO to relay actuation.

g.text: Hardware sensors — no data leaves the home

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PZEM-004T current sensor in EcoPulse')
sendPrompt('How does the PIR occupancy sensor work in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('What role does the DHT22 sensor play in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('How is the LDR light sensor used for lighting decisions?')
sendPrompt('What do the ESP32 microcontroller nodes do in EcoPulse?')

g.text: MQTT broker (Mosquitto) — Local Wi-Fi mesh · QoS 1 sensor · QoS 2 relay · <5 ms latency
Edge intelligence layer — Raspberry Pi 5 (Ubuntu 24.04 · Docker Compose)
All inference local · no cloud · 8 GB RAM · 2.4 GHz Cortex-A76

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Sensor Aggregator service in EcoPulse')
sendPrompt('How does InfluxDB store sensor data in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the NILM disaggregation model work in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the LSTM demand forecaster work in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the PPO reinforcement learning agent work in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('Explain the actuator publisher service in EcoPulse')
sendPrompt('What is the safety layer override in EcoPulse?')

g.text: Execution layer — ESP32 SSR relay nodes
10 A solid-state relays · zero-crossing · >10⁸ switch cycles

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does EcoPulse control the HVAC system?')
sendPrompt('How does EcoPulse dim LED lighting?')
sendPrompt('How does EcoPulse schedule the electric geyser?')
sendPrompt('How are vampire loads controlled in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does EcoPulse control kitchen appliances?')
sendPrompt('How does EcoPulse schedule EV charging?')
sendPrompt('Describe the EcoPulse web dashboard and PWA')
sendPrompt('How does the manual override work in EcoPulse?')
sendPrompt('What savings metrics does EcoPulse show the user?')
sendPrompt('What comfort settings can users configure in EcoPulse?')
